The sword ... famine ... pestilence] War, famine, and pestilence-each represents a sermon from heaven delivered to gain the attention of those who have refused the whisperings of the Spirit and the voice of prophets. (Joseph Fielding Mc Conkie and Robert L. Millet, Doctrinal Commentary on the Book of Mormon, 4 vols., 3:, p.400)

The sword ... famine ... pestilence] War, famine, and pestilence-each represents a sermon from heaven delivered to gain the attention of those who have refused the whisperings of the Spirit and the voice of prophets.
